headline: Amazon speeds up deliveries in L.A. and elsewhere with one-hour option
summary: The e-commerce giant said customers will have the option to get items delivered in three hours or less if they pay a fee.

headline: Walmart's Valuation Looks Rich: Should You Stay Invested in the Stock?
summary: WMT commands a premium valuation, driven by strong e-commerce growth, omnichannel strength and rising ad revenues.

headline: Target Uses Circle Deal Days to Drive Spring Demand & Loyalty Growth
summary: TGT to kick off Circle Deal Days on March 25-27, offering exclusive discounts and loyalty perks to boost spring sales and repeat visits.

raw.headline: Target Uses Circle Deal Days to Drive Spring Demand & Loyalty Growth
raw.summary: TGT to kick off Circle Deal Days on March 25-27, offering exclusive discounts and loyalty perks to boost spring sales and repeat visits.

headline: Target consolidates spring savings event into 3 days
summary: Competitors expanded the length of seasonal sales over the past year, but the retailer’s March event marks a reduction from 2025’s Target Circle Week sale.

raw.headline: Target consolidates spring savings event into 3 days
raw.summary: Competitors expanded the length of seasonal sales over the past year, but the retailer’s March event marks a reduction from 2025’s Target Circle Week sale.

headline: Amazon rolls out 1-hour, 3-hour delivery as ultrafast shipping trend grows in the U.S.
summary: Amazon is speeding up deliveries even further after investing significant money and resources to make same-day shipping the standard.

raw.headline: Amazon rolls out 1-hour, 3-hour delivery as ultrafast shipping trend grows in the U.S.
raw.summary: Amazon is speeding up deliveries even further after investing significant money and resources to make same-day shipping the standard.

headline: Target's plan to win back customers has serious flaw
summary: Remember when shopping at Target was actually fun? You'd walk in with a budget in mind and hope that by the time you left, you didn't more than triple it. But if you've spent a meaningful amount of time at a Target store lately, you probably know that shopping there is now more of a chore ...

headline: Large-format Grocery & General Merchandise Retailer Stocks Q4 Earnings Review: Target (NYSE:TGT) Shines
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at large-format grocery & general merchandise retailer stocks, starting with Target (NYSE:TGT).
